registry.name: L++ Package Registry
registry.description: Official L++ package registry — Git-based, JSON-indexed

lpp-zip.name: lpp-zip
lpp-zip.description: ZIP archive create/read library — pure L++ using buf_* primitives
features: Create ZIP archives with multiple files
Read ZIP archives and extract entries
Pure L++ — no C code, no linker changes

api.zip_add_file: (archive: Int, filename: Str, content: Str) — add file to archive
api.zip_save: (archive: Int, path: Str) — write ZIP to disk
api.zip_open: (path: Str) -> Int — open ZIP file for reading
api.zip_entry_name: (handle: Int, index: Int) -> Str — get entry filename
api.zip_entry_data: (handle: Int, index: Int) -> Str — get entry content

lpp-math.name: lpp-math
lpp-math.description: Math utilities — abs, min, max, pow, gcd, lcm, fib, factorial

lpp-strings.name: lpp-strings
lpp-strings.description: String utilities — repeat, contains, starts_with, reverse, pad

lpp-collections.name: lpp-collections
lpp-collections.description: Collection utilities — list_sum, list_max, list_min, list_reverse

lpp-algo.name: lpp-algo
lpp-algo.description: Algorithm library — bubble_sort, binary_search, list_range, list_fill
